name: Vanilla Custard Cream - Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the caster sugar, corn flour, plain flour, and milk together in a 1.5-liter bowl, mixing well with a whisk.
2. Microwave at 100% (high) for 7 - 7.5 minutes until thick, stirring vigorously with a hand whisk every 2 minutes.
3. Lightly beat the yolks in a separate bowl and mix in 6 tablespoons of the hot custard. Blend thoroughly, then stir the yolk mixture into the remaining custard.
4. Microwave for an additional 1-2 minutes or until thick.
5. Beat in the butter and vanilla extract, then cover with cling film or greaseproof paper. Leave to cool.
